name: 575 Pickleball
description: Visit 575pickleball.com for session details, drop in rates, and memberships. Advanced sign up required.
open_play_schedule: Check out 575pickleball.com for current hours and links to session times

name: Avery Creek
description: Come play pickleball at Avery Creek in Woodstock, GA! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Ball Ground Pickleball Courts
description:
2 permanent courts and 2 courts with lines (you will need your own net). 

Courts have open play Friday evenings and Sundays. Join Ball Ground Pickleball Club Facebook page.

name: BridgeMill Athletic Club
description: Must be a member to play or guest of member.

name: Cherokee Veterans Park
description: Cherokee Veterans Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Canton, GA. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Dupree Park
description: Dupree Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Woodstock, GA. There are 6 outdoor asphalt and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and lights.
open_play_schedule: These are the only posted open play times by the City of Woodstock.

name: Eagle Watch Pickleball Courts
description:
Eagle Watch has a beautiful setup for the growing Pickleball community. Hosting weekly round robin session available to both members and the general public.

Visit www.eaglewatchtennis.com/ew-pickleball, for more information about memberships and round robin sessions.

name: Free Home Elementary School
description: Free Home Elementary School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Canton, GA. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are not available. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are private.

name: Full Court
description: Come play pickleball at Full Court in Woodstock, GA! There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: G Cecil Pruett YMCA
description: G Cecil Pruett YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Canton, GA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Jarvis Pickleball Courts
description: Jarvis Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Canton, GA. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets.

name: Kenny Askew Park
description:
Ladder Leagues and Skills and Drills classes are held Wednesday evening and Friday mornings.

Beginner classes are offered as well.

Planned events require advance registration
open_play_schedule: Check out TopPickleball.net or on Facebook for planned activities at this site.

name: Lake Arrowhead
description: Lake Arrowhead is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Waleska, GA. There are 10 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. Players have access to restrooms and lights. You can reserve the courts.
open_play_schedule: Lake Arowhead is a beautiful, gated community with a 550 + acre lake, 18-hole golf course, and of course a great pickleball facility. Our courts are fairly new with wind screens for year-round play. You must be a property owner or guest to play. For more information contacted Bill Hess at 770-313 7370.
fees: Private — Lake Arowhead is a beautiful, gated community with a 550 + acre lake, 18-hole golf course, and of course a great pickleball facility. Our courts are fairly new with wind screens for year-rou

name: Lake Sovereign Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Lake Sovereign Courts in Canton, GA! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The court lines are permanent. The courts are private.
fees: Private — Use is limited to Lake Sovereign residents and their guests.

name: Life Time - Woodstock
description: Life Time - Woodstock is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Woodstock, GA. There are 3 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, lights, food, locker rooms, water, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play.

name: North Georgia Pickleball Club
description: Come play pickleball at North Georgia Pickleball Club in Canton, GA! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Phoenix Rising Training Center
description: Phoenix Rising Training Center is a place to play pickleball in Canton, GA. There are 2 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms. The courts can be reserved.

name: Soleil Laurel Canyon
description: Soleil is a private gated community NOT open to the public. Not sure how it got listed here.

name: Towne Lake Hills Tennis Club
description: Come play pickleball at Towne Lake Hills Tennis Club in Woodstock, GA! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Woodmont Golf And Country Club
description: Only members/residents and guest of members are allowed to play at Woodmont
fees: Members only — Must be a member or a guest of a member to play
